description: A simple rattan flipflop is transformed into a stylish feminine sandal with colourful, feminine beads stitched onto the straps. Wear this with fun summery dresses or to dress up casual jeans. Upper Slim fabric straps across midfoot with toe separator Butterfly and bead decorations on strap Rattan footbed for breathable comfort Fabric edging around sole Outsole Grooved flat sole for good grip Sandal Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
